ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- (payload orderBy $.Sort_Order__c) map (inst) -> { id: inst.Id, milestoneName: inst.Milestone_Name__c, dueDate: inst.Due_Date__c, amount: inst.Amount__c default 0, status: inst.Status__c, paidDate: inst.Paid_Date__c, penaltyAmount: inst.Penalty_Amount__c, sortOrder: inst.Sort_Order__c default 0 }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload map (inv) -> { id: inv.Id, invoiceNumber: inv.Name, invoiceDate: inv.Invoice_Date__c, dueDate: inv.Due_Date__c, amount: inv.Amount__c default 0, status: inv.Status__c, hasPdf: inv.PDF_Attachment_Id__c != null }
